nodes.name: forbidden-phrases.md
nodes.summary: Reference list of 15 forbidden speculative phrases (e.g., 'should work', 'I believe', 'probably fine') with evidence-based verified alternatives. Core resource for the anti-rationalization synapse that enforces epistemic hygiene in agent outputs.

nodes.name: iron-laws.md
nodes.summary: The 10 iron laws for agent behavior including: no production code without a failing test, no fixes without root cause investigation, no completion claims without fresh verification evidence. Each law includes escape conditions. Core enforcement document for the anti-rationalization synapse.

nodes.name: rationalization-tables.md
nodes.summary: Structured tables mapping common AI rationalization patterns to their detection signals and correct counter-responses. Enables systematic identification of rationalization in agent reasoning chains.

nodes.name: red-flags.md
nodes.summary: Catalog of red-flag behaviors and thought patterns that indicate an agent is rationalizing rather than reasoning. Used by the anti-rationalization synapse to trigger self-correction protocols.
